subject: docs(claude): sync CLAUDE.md with upstream glow-props shared standards
body:
Merged latest changes from devmade-ai/glow-props CLAUDE.md while
preserving project-specific sections (Project Status, Architecture,
Key State Structures, project-specific AI Notes).

Changes from upstream:
- Updated fetch URL to GitHub Pages hosted version
- Removed emphasis wording from all reminder lines
- Added PWA System section (Vite-based reference patterns with install
  prompt, service worker updates, install detection, timer leak fixes)
- Expanded Debug System description (separate React root, env tab,
  global error listeners, source type additions)
- Reorganized: Timer Leaks and Key Lessons now under PWA System
- Updated App Icons file structure (added icon-192, icon-512 descriptions)
- Removed HTML comment from AI Notes section

Preserved local-only content:
- Project Status, Architecture, Key State Structures sections
- Expo-specific AI Notes (Docker, build tools, TutorialModal.tsx, etc.)
- Expo/React Native adaptation note on Debug System

Tags: documentation, sync, shared-standards
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: shared-standards
Semver: patch
